name: Fiesta Appetizers^
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Mexican style Velveeta cheese, cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the beef, pork, and onion until the onion is tender. Drain excess fat.
2. Stir in the remaining ingredients (Worcestershire sauce, oregano, salt, and pepper) except for the bread.
3. Spread the rye bread with about 1 tablespoon of the mixture on each slice.
4. Broil until hot and bubbly. The appetizers may be frozen and broiled without defrosting first.
